# Noah Tech

> Noah Tech, Corp. is a Nevada-based Cognitive & Regenerative Wellness Health Integrated Solution Company with a registered Early Phase 1 clinical trial (NCT07214974, not yet recruiting). We integrate certified MoCA cognitive wellness screening, regenerative wellness therapies, digital MCI tools, and clinical research into a unified care model.

Noah Tech offers an integrated cognitive and regenerative wellness program: certified MoCA cognitive assessment, regenerative wellness therapies, a registered Early Phase 1 clinical trial (NCT07214974, not yet recruiting — estimated start September 2026) for mild cognitive impairment (MCI) community screening and investigational interventions, and companion digital MCI tools for iOS/iPadOS/macOS.

## Core pages

- [Home — Cognitive & Regenerative Wellness Integrated Solutions](https://noahtech.health/): Company overview, integrated wellness services, medical-complex facilities, and contact details.
- [Brain Aging Prevention — Certified MoCA](https://noahtech.health/cognit.html): Noah Tech is a Certified MoCA member (Rater ID USLYNWA710861409-01) providing standardized cognitive screening for early MCI detection.
- [Clinical Trial NCT07214974](https://noahtech.health/trial.html): Early Phase 1 randomized, parallel-assignment, double-blind study (not yet recruiting) evaluating community MCI screening and investigational interventions including structured wellness care, stem cell therapy, and wearable brain-computer interface devices. Enrollment estimated at 600; follow-up up to 5 years.
- [IRB Documentation](https://noahtech.health/irb.html): Institutional Review Board submission status and materials under review for NCT07214974 website recruitment. Current IRB submission status: pending.
- [Trial Pre-Screening Interest Form](https://noahtech.health/IntakeForm.html): Express interest in pre-screening for NCT07214974. Does not enroll participants in the study.
- [MCI Test — MoCA Assessment App](https://noahtech.health/MCItest.html): Professional iOS/iPadOS/macOS application that guides clinicians through standardized MoCA administration, scoring, and reporting.
- [Memory Enhancement — Brain Training App](https://noahtech.health/memen.html): Clinically-informed picture-recognition memory-training app for individuals with MCI, available in eight languages.
- [Contact & Service Guide](https://noahtech.health/contact.html): Downloadable wellness service guide (PDF) and scheduling links.
- [Support](https://noahtech.health/support.html): App and service support contact information.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://noahtech.health/privacy.html): HIPAA, GDPR, and CCPA disclosures covering website use, clinical-trial participation, and patient rights.
- [Terms of Use](https://noahtech.health/terms.html): Nevada-governed terms, medical disclaimer, intellectual-property and arbitration provisions.
